description: OpenBudget connects users' US bank account data to AI assistants through a hosted MCP server. It uses Plaid-backed, read-only account access and OAuth-based user authorization.
summary: OpenBudget exposes one OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.openbudget.sh/mcp over Streamable HTTP; no separate public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surface was found for api.openbudget.sh.
